qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: Consider the following program. Assume parameters to a function are evaluated from right to left. #include <stdio.h> int g(int p) { printf("%d", p); return p; } int h(int q) { printf("%d", q); return q; } void f(int x, int y) { g(x); h(y); } int main() { f(g(10), h(20)); } Which one of the following
